message:
🌱 Add knative: How to use locally built docker image? mission (#1482)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-6101-how-to-use-locally-built-docker-image",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative: How to use locally built docker image?",
+    "description": "How to use locally built docker image?. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current knative deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your knative version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative\nhelm list -n knative 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working knative installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative\nkubectl get configmap -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative\n```\n## In what area(s)?\r\r\r\r\r\r\n\n## Ask your question here:\n\nI have built a simple docker image for a node app that serves a `hello world` on port 8080, if I `minikube ssh` and run `docker images` I can see my image under `minikube-test`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for How to use locally built docker image?",
+        "description": "Locally built docker images don't seem to have a digest. (Possible explanation: [Why doesn't my newly-created docker have a digest?](https://stackoverflow.com/a/39812035))\n\n```\n$ docker images --digests | grep minikube-test\nminikube-test                       v1        <none>        ffe2d2bc2aa4   \n```yaml\n.\n.\ncontainers:\n  - name: minikube-test\n    image: minikube-test:v1\n    imagePullPolicy: Never\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative\nkubectl get events -n knative --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"How to use locally built docker image?\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Locally built docker images don't seem to have a digest.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        ".\n.\ncontainers:\n  - name: minikube-test\n    image: minikube-test:v1\n    imagePullPolicy: Never",
+        "apiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1\n   kind: Service\n   metadata:\n     name: minikube-test\n   spec:\n     template:\n       spec:\n         containers:\n           - name: minikube-test\n             image: minikube-test:v1\n             imagePullPolicy: Never\n             env:\n               - name: TARGET\n                 value: \"minikube-test knative\"",
+        "$ kubectl apply -f service.yaml\nservice.serving.knative.dev/minikube-test created\n\n$ kubectl get routes\nNAME            URL                                        READY   REASON\nminikube-test   http://minikube-test.default.example.com   False   RevisionMissing\n\n$ kubectl describe ksvc/minikube-test\nName:         minikube-test\nNamespace:    default\n.\n.\nStatus:\n  Conditions:\n    Last Transition Time:        2019-11-26T12:08:39Z\n    Message:                     Revision \"minikube-test-srm6c\" failed with message: Unable to fetch image \"minikube-test:v1\": unrecognized HTTP status: 403 Forbidden.\n    Reason:                      RevisionFailed\n    Status:                      False\n    Type:                        ConfigurationsReady\n    Last Transition Time:        2019-11-26T12:08:39Z\n    Mess"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative"
+    ],

+      "Namespace",
+      "Node",
+      "Service"
+    ],

+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/serving/issues/6101",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/serving"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-19T06:25:43.707Z",
